title: satureja varia subsp. gomerensis
intro: Satureja varia subsp. gomerensis, also known as Gomerense savory, is a subspecies of the satureja varia plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family and native to the Canary Islands. It possesses antimicrobial, antifungal, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable plant for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Gomerense savory include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties, as well as its potential in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Gomerense savory can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
